title: weinmannia elliptica var. elliptica
intro: Weinmannia elliptica var. elliptica, also known as the 'New Zealand tōtara', is a plant species native to New Zealand, belonging to the family Cunoniaceae. The plant is used in traditional Māori medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Weinmannia elliptica var. elliptica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
